title: School of Wisdom Evidence Contract
description: Repo-native evidence contract for Jay Wisdom's School of Wisdom. Search first, separate evidence classes, speak second.

machine_speed_protocol.rule_2: Fetch files directly before claiming contents
machine_speed_protocol.rule_4: Git blob SHA is not SHA256
machine_speed_protocol.rule_5: Workflow file existence is not workflow run success
machine_speed_protocol.rule_6: Empty workflow runs equal YELLOW, not failure
machine_speed_protocol.rule_7: Full byte-by-byte certainty requires local clone plus sha256 replay

commit_sha.description: Git commit object proving a repository state transition
commit_sha.green_requirement: Full or uniquely resolvable commit SHA plus path or diff relevance

git_blob_sha.description: Git object identity for a file blob
git_blob_sha.green_requirement: Fetched file readback returns matching blob SHA

sha256_receipt_line.description: SHA256 digest line over file bytes, distinct from Git blob SHA
sha256_receipt_line.green_requirement: Fetched receipt file contains digest and target path

fetched_content.description: Direct readback of file content from GitHub
fetched_content.green_requirement: Content lines support the claim being made

workflow_file.green_requirement: Workflow file fetched and relevant watches/checks present

workflow_run_status.green_requirement: Workflow run ID plus successful conclusion or equivalent run evidence

external_chain_readback.description: Independent chain or explorer verification of an on-chain claim
external_chain_readback.green_requirement: Tx hash, block data, attestation UID, or explorer/API readback independently fetched

full_tree_replay.description: Local clone plus deterministic sha256 replay of declared files or tree
full_tree_replay.green_requirement: Command transcript or receipt proving byte-by-byte replay

state_labels.GREEN: Direct evidence supports the scoped claim
state_labels.GREEN_SCOPED: Direct evidence supports the file or claim, but not broader execution
state_labels.GREEN_AS_DRAFT_SPEC: Spec file exists and is readable, while its own execution truth remains YELLOW
state_labels.PARTIAL_GREEN: Some evidence classes are satisfied and others remain unresolved
state_labels.YELLOW: Claim is plausible or prepared but lacks required evidence class

examples: Git blob SHA equals SHA256 is false
Workflow file exists equals workflow run passed is false
Repo receipt equals external chain readback is false
Draft spec equals execution is false
